All students must meet a 2.8 GPA cumulative GPA for admission.</p><p><br></p><p>Complete the courses below and maintain a <strong>2.50</strong> GPA in each series:</p><p><br></p><p>○    Biological Sciences (BIS) 002A/B/C</p><p>○    Chemistry (CHE) 002A/B/C</p><p>○    Mathematics (MAT) 017A/B or 021A/B</p><p><br></p><p>Visit Department agreements as needed</p><p><br></p><p>Contact your UC Davis Advisor for questions (<a href=\"https://ua.ucdavis.edu/portal/find-my-advisor\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">Find my advisor</a>)</p><p><br></p><p>Note:</p><p><strong>Advanced Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) Examination:</strong></p><p>AP and IB examination credit policies are detailed in the UC Davis <a href=\"https://local-resources.ucdavis.edu/local_resources/docs/catalog/GenCat20252026.pdf\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">General Catalog</a>. Quick reference charts for <a href=\"https://local-resources.ucdavis.edu/local_resources/docs/APIBCharts/APCurrent.pdf\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">AP</a> and <a href=\"https://local-resources.ucdavis.edu/local_resources/docs/APIBCharts/IBCurrent.pdf\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">IB</a>.</p>","groupId":"acb46f45-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":3,"area":"General"},{"type":"GeneralText","content":"<p>Every living organism, from the smallest and most primitive bacteria to every plant, insect, animal or human being, contains DNA as the primary genetic material. DNA directs all cellular processes, creating the incredible variety and diversity of living organisms in the biosphere. Biotechnology focuses on the mechanics of life processes and their application. <a href=\"https://local-resources.ucdavis.edu/local_resources/docs/catalog/GenCat20252026.pdf\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">Biotechnology</a> means \"life technology\" and represents an integrated, multidisciplinary field, with a profound impact today on almost every aspect of human endeavor.</p>","groupId":"aeb46f45-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":1,"area":"General"},{"type":"GeneralText","content":"<p>At the time of <a href=\"https://www.ucdavis.edu/admissions/undergraduate/transfer/transfer-admission-guarantee\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" target=\"_blank\">TAG</a> submission, Biotechnology requires a minimum <strong>3.20 </strong>cumulative GPA and at least a <strong>2.50</strong> GPA in each series with no grades less than a C to receive a Transfer Admission Guarantee.</p>","groupId":"b3b46f45-6887-ef11-8474-000d3a37e3b6","position":5,"area":"General"}]
